THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.char:
[b]THE CHAMP HAS ARRIVED![/b]
So YOU'RE the one nobody's ever beaten? Title match!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.ancie: The arena's champion. Your place is the lower floors, amusing the rabble. Not here.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.anci: The loud one returns. Does the crowd in your head still cheer?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-1r.char: [b]They never stop cheering![/b] Now hold still and take your beating!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-2r.anci: How exhausting. Let us finish this.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0r.anci: You have lost to me. Repeatedly. Yet you call yourself undefeated.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1r.char: [jitter]Those were WARM-UPS! THIS is the real match![/jitter]
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient: Well slap me silly, it's the big shot from the arena! That's a mighty fine crown ya got there.
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char:
[b]Eyes off the crown, junk man![/b] It's one of a kind!
...But I'll take some new gear.
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: Hah! Take whatcha want from the pile, champ!
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: Still undefeated, big guy? Grab somethin' to keep that streak alive!
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: Got a whole crate of old trophies back here. Bet half of 'em used to be yours.
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [b]ALL of 'em were mine![/b] ...Wait. How'd YOU get my trophies?
DARV.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: Eh, stuff just ends up in my pile! Take 'em back, no charge!
NEOW.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char:
[b]LIES![/b] The Champ has NEVER lost!
...What's 'died' mean again?
NEOW.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [jitter]So THAT'S how I stay undefeated! You're on my team![/jitter]
NEOW.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: [sine]...the.. one.. at.. the.. top... ..has.. never.. ..been.. beaten... ..go...[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient:
Ah, a performer! The arena's glory clings to you like perfume.
Come, let me adorn you for your grandest match yet.
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char: [b]NOW we're talkin'![/b] Make the Champ look GOOD for the crowd!
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: Such delightful vanity! Wear these with pride.
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: The showman returns. Dazzling as ever! Take these, and shine.
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: Tell me, champion — have you heard? The one seated at the very summit has never once been beaten.
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [b]Never been beaten?![/b] ...Then he's never met THE CHAMP!
NONUPEIPE.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: Precisely what I hoped you'd say. Go — take his title, and let them all watch.
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient:
BIG fighter!! SO strong!! Champ Champ CHAMP!!
Can I watch?? Please please!!
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char: [b]HA! A fan with TASTE![/b] Stick around, little guy. I'll put on a show!
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: YESSS!! Take this!! Strong things for strong Champ!!
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: Champ back!! Still winning?? Of course winning!! Take take!!
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: Why fight always? Fighting hurts! Why why??
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [b]'Cause winnin' feels GREAT, kid![/b] Nothin' beats hearin' 'em chant your name!
OROBAS.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: Chant?? I chant too!! CHAMP! CHAMP! CHAMP!!
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]So much noise in you, champion... rest. Take a part of me, find peace...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char:
[b]PEACE?! Rest is for LOSERS, lizard![/b]
...but I'll take the free stuff.
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]As you wish... but the body remembers every blow...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: [thinky_dots]The loud one returns. Even now, will you not simply... sleep...?[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]A thousand victories, yet you cannot sit still for one breath. Why...?[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [b]Sittin' still is how you get FORGOTTEN![/b] Champs keep movin'!
PAEL.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]...how tiring it must be... to never be allowed to lose...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient: A FIGHTER! A REAL ONE!! I CAN SMELL THE VICTORIES ON YOU!!
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char: [b]Damn right![/b] The undisputed King of the Arena, in the flesh!
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: KING?! THERE CAN BE ONLY ONE KING!! BUT FIRST — TAKE A WEAPON!!
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: STILL UNDEFEATED?! THEN YOU NEED MORE WEAPONS!! TAKE THEM!!
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: FIGHT ME, CHAMPION!! KING AGAINST KING!!
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [i][font_size=22]The Champ and Tanx brawl across the arena floor.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: HAHAHA!! WHAT A BOUT!! TAKE THIS WEAPON, WORTHY FOE!!
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient: Oh, what a [jitter][b]big[/b][/jitter] strong boy! Come in, dear, let me feed that hungry [jitter][b]ego[/b][/jitter] of yours.
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char: [b]Finally, someone who GETS it![/b] Feed away, whatever you are!
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: Oh, I shall. A flame like yours deserves to [jitter][b]devour[/b][/jitter] everything.
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: Back again, sweetie? Let me stoke that [jitter][b]fire[/b][/jitter] a little [jitter][b]hotter[/b][/jitter].
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: Tell me, champion... what happens to a [jitter][b]flame[/b][/jitter] that has burned every rival to ash?
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [b]Then it finds BIGGER rivals![/b] The Champ never runs outta challengers!
TEZCATARA.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient: [jitter][b]Mmm.[/b][/jitter] Such an appetite. I do hope it never [jitter][b]consumes[/b][/jitter] you, dear.
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-0.ancient: The famous champion. I can make you [sine]immortal[/sine] in the arena. Undefeated, forever.
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-1.char: [b]Already am, pal![/b] But... 'forever' does have a nice ring to it.
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.0-2.ancient: Then sign. A small price, for endless glory.
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.1-0r.ancient: Still hungry for the crowd's love? My contracts never expire.
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-0.ancient: You fight and fight, yet the cheering never fills you. Tell me, champion... [sine]what[/sine] are you truly fighting for?
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-1.char: [jitter]To be the GREATEST![/jitter] ...That's it. That's gotta be enough.
VAKUU.talk.CHAMP-CHAMP.2-2.ancient:
[i][font_size=22][sine]How telling.[/sine][/font_size][/i]
Sign. Let me give that hunger a name.
